question: Which director is in charge of the most programs?
sql: SELECT d.Name FROM director d JOIN program p ON d.Director_ID = p.Director_ID GROUP BY d.Director_ID ORDER BY COUNT(p.Program_ID) DESC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 查询导演及其执导的节目数量，按数量降序排列并取最多的一个

semantic.reason: 语义一致，SQL反向翻译描述准确表达了原始问题的意图，即统计每位导演负责的节目数量，按数量降序排列后取最多的一个。
